summary: Completed E2E testing of the turnkey apartment renovation landing page (ФОРМАТ) in Irkutsk, including FastAPI backend endpoints and React frontend interactive flows.
critical_code_review_comments: The code is extremely well-structured and follows clean React state management principles.
The backend is structured around a fast and asynchronous FastAPI router, integrating smoothly with MongoDB.
Lucide React, Framer Motion, and Tailwind CSS are used correctly to provide a high-end custom UI with smooth interactions.
Separation of concerns is maintained well by storing data constants in /app/frontend/src/constants/data.js.
seed_data_creation: Temporary test lead and status check documents with 'TEST_' prefix were inserted and successfully cleaned up during the class-level pytest teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend and frontend flows are 100% verified. Pytest results are generated at /app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml. Playwright E2E screenshots are saved under /app/test_reports/ showing perfect layout rendering.
